Container.Name: ukho-tides-pixlet
Container.Overview: Display UK tide times on your Tidbyt device using UKHO Admiralty tidal data. Shows a tide curve chart with next high/low times and heights. Station is configurable (defaults to Salcombe).
Container.Description: Display UK tide times on your Tidbyt device using UKHO Admiralty tidal data. Shows a tide curve chart with next high/low times and heights. Station is configurable (defaults to Salcombe).
Container.Requires: Requires a UKHO Admiralty API key (free) and Tidbyt device credentials.

Config.Name: Admiralty API Key
Config.Description: UKHO Admiralty API subscription key. Sign up free at https://admiraltyapi.portal.azure-api.net

Config.Name: Tidbyt Device ID
Config.Description: Your Tidbyt device ID (find in Tidbyt app settings)

Config.Name: Tidbyt API Token
Config.Description: Your Tidbyt API token (find in Tidbyt app settings)

Config.Name: Station ID
Config.Description: UKHO station ID. Default 0020 = Salcombe. Find IDs at https://easytide.admiralty.co.uk

Config.Name: Push Interval
Config.Description: How often to update the Tidbyt display (systemd timer format, e.g. 15min, 30min, 1h)
